'''pawozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmeterium|osmeterium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmeterium|osmeterium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pawozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæwezheth|pæwezheth]] || [[word:pæwezhej|pæwezhej]] || [[word:pæwezhesh|pæwezhesh]] || [[word:pæwezhe|pæwezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pawowozhoth|pawowozhoth]] || [[word:pawowozhoj|pawowozhoj]] || [[word:pawowozhosh|pawowozhosh]] || [[word:pawowozho|pawowozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pawozhoth|pawozhoth]] || [[word:pawozhoj|pawozhoj]] || [[word:pawozhosh|pawozhosh]] || [[word:pawozho|pawozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pawofzhoth|pawofzhoth]] || [[word:pawofzhoj|pawofzhoj]] || [[word:pawofzhosh|pawofzhosh]] || [[word:pawofzhof|pawofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pawozhotho|pawozhotho]] || [[word:pawozhojo|pawozhojo]] || [[word:pawozhosho|pawozhosho]] || [[word:pawozhoko|pawozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pawozhoth|pawozhoth]] || [[word:pawozhoj|pawozhoj]] || [[word:pawozhosh|pawozhosh]] || [[word:pawozho|pawozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pawozhothol|pawozhothol]] || [[word:pawozhojol|pawozhojol]] || [[word:pawozhoshol|pawozhoshol]] || [[word:pawozhokol|pawozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pawozhothotho|pawozhothotho]] || [[word:pawozhojojo|pawozhojojo]] || [[word:pawozhoshosho|pawozhoshosho]] || [[word:pawozhoko|pawozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pawozhothon|pawozhothon]] || [[word:pawozhojon|pawozhojon]] || [[word:pawozhoshon|pawozhoshon]] || [[word:pawozhokon|pawozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pawozhothoro|pawozhothoro]] || [[word:pawozhojoro|pawozhojoro]] || [[word:pawozhoshoro|pawozhoshoro]] || [[word:pawozhokoro|pawozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
